allow: Bash(python3 -c 'import numpy,pandas,scipy,yaml; print\("py deps OK", numpy.__version__, pandas.__version__, scipy.__version__\)')
Bash(timeout 150 Rscript -e 'install.packages\("poolr", repos="https://cloud.r-project.org", quiet=TRUE\); cat\("poolr installed:", requireNamespace\("poolr", quietly=TRUE\), "\\n"\)')
Bash(Rscript -e 'install.packages\("poolr", repos="https://cloud.r-project.org", quiet=TRUE\); cat\("poolr_installed:", requireNamespace\("poolr", quietly=TRUE\), "\\n"\)')
